description:
🕒 09:30–14:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morikaori-rose/

Surrounded by pesticide-free roses and herbs, you'll create a body-friendly lunch together using rose petals and fresh vegetables. Supported by the sounds of the kantele (Finnish harp) and rose water, this eco-tour lets you connect with nature through all five senses as your body relaxes from within.

【Fee】
¥4,000 per person (includes guide, ingredients, insurance, etc.)

【Capacity】
8 participants

【Guide】
Mori Kaori

【What to bring】
Mask, apron, head kerchief, writing materials
location: 集合 森香織宅（飯能市笠縫）※詳細は申込後 西武池袋線「飯能駅」から徒歩20分/「東飯能駅」から徒歩15分
summary: 🌹 Rose Garden Wellness & Herb Lunch Eco-Tour
